历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category dropped from approximately 18560 to 19952 to 21776 to 23029 to 25339, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 6779 places; in the last 3 years (2023 to 2025), the cumulative shift was about 3563 places, with an average annual shift of about 1188 places, showing a clearly accelerating backward trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 25339 places; the enrollment plan for Physics Category was 60 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 64 students in 2024 and 2025; the 2026 plan is 74 students, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and will significantly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 45th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 42–47 range in recent years, indicating the university's comprehensive strength is at the upper-middle level nationally; there are no negative records in the reputation file, and the reputation is stable; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (ranked 54th overall), with a certain level of attention on short video platforms; no records of filing gaps or sharp drops, with stable admission trends; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Husbandry A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding strength in agricultural and forestry disciplines, providing stable attraction for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; the university's Computer Science, Mechanical, and Optoelectronic Information majors benefit from the overall engineering popularity; majors related to advantageous disciplines like Biological Sciences and Food Science and Engineering have stable popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 136,950, a decrease of about 2,528 (-1.81%) compared to 2025 (139,478), with a slight reduction in candidate scale, slightly easing competition. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, sharing the Yangtze River Economic Belt with Chongqing, with convenient transportation and relatively high regional acceptance; the university's enrollment scale in Chongqing is moderate (74 students in Physics Category), at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of about 15.6% in Physics Category in 2026 which will notably lower the ranking, the slight decrease of about 1.81% in provincial Physics Category examinees slightly easing competition, as well as the stable school reputation and high popularity of engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 25339 places, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to continue shifting backward; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 27900 places, with a range of 27400–28400 places.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated significantly: approximately 3174 → 3323 → 3913 → 3880 → 3581, peaking at 3913 in 2023 before recovering in 2024–2025; the 2025 baseline is about 3581. Enrollment plans for History Category were 13 from 2021 to 2023, increased to 14 in 2024–2025, and are projected to be 12 in 2026, a reduction of about 14.3% compared to 2025, which will push the ranking higher (smaller ranking number, increased competition).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 45th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings between 42–47 in recent years. The university has no negative records in reputation files, maintaining a stable reputation; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot'; no records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops. Veterinary Medicine (A+), Animal Husbandry (A+), Crop Science (A), Aquaculture (A), and Food Science and Engineering (A) are strong, primarily in agriculture and engineering, which have limited direct appeal to History Category candidates, but the overall 211 level still attracts liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors like Law and Chinese Language/Literature are socially popular, with Law (History Category) having higher historical rankings; Business Administration and Public Administration show divided and wait-and-see popularity. The estimated number of History Category candidates in the province for 2026 is about 72,050, a decrease of about 1,323 (-1.80%) from 2025 (73,373), indicating a slight reduction in candidate pool. Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, sharing the Yangtze River Economic Belt with Chongqing, offering convenient transportation and relatively high regional acceptance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in 2025 rankings, the approximately 14.3% reduction in History Category enrollment plans for 2026 intensifying competition, the slight decrease of about 1.80% in provincial History Category candidates slightly easing competition, and the stable university reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 3581, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward (smaller ranking number); the predicted minimum ranking is about 3350, with a range of 3250–3450.
